executiveSummary: All 3 user stories and 7 functional requirements for iteration 000034 are implemented and comply with the PRD. The song title feature is fully wired end-to-end: the LLM generates it via CREATIVE_DIRECTOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, OrchestrationResult validates it, the backend propagates it through the X-Song-Title HTTP header, the frontend stores it per queue entry, displays the raw title in the UI, and uses a sanitized version as the MP4 recording filename with proper fallback. Two minor observations were identified: a naming discrepancy between the PRD-specified function name `sanitizeTitle` and the actual implementation `sanitizeFilename`, and visual browser verification (US-002-AC05) is unconfirmable via static code audit.
minorObservations: FR-6 names the utility `sanitizeTitle(title: string): string` but the implementation is `sanitizeFilename(title: string): string | null` in `src/lib/sanitize-filename.ts`. The return type difference (`string | null` vs `string`) is actually an improvement that makes the empty-string fallback explicit, but the naming deviates from the PRD spec. Low risk.
US-002-AC05 (visually verified in browser) cannot be confirmed through static code audit. Manual QA in a running environment is required to fully close this criterion.

In `video_service.py` `_resolve_pipeline_prompts`, the actual LTX2 video prompt (`ltx2_prompt`) is unused â€” `video_prompt` is set to `validated.image_prompt` with the LTX2 call commented out. This is pre-existing behaviour unrelated to the song title feature, but worth tracking as technical debt.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: The iteration 000034 implementation is fully compliant with the PRD. No remediation is required. Recommendations: (1) Align the utility function name with the PRD (`sanitizeTitle`) or update the PRD to reflect the chosen name `sanitizeFilename` â€” either direction is acceptable, but consistency aids onboarding. (2) Perform a manual browser smoke test to formally close US-002-AC05. (3) Create a technical debt item for the commented-out LTX2 video prompt path in video_service.py so it is not forgotten.
